# Algorithms & Data Structures Learning Resources (11)

> Visualizations, textbooks, roadmaps, and practice platforms for algorithms and data structures.

| Title | Type | Diff | Concepts | Author | Fresh | Off | Free | Lang |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [VisuAlgo — Algorithm Visualizations](https://visualgo.net/) | 🎮 Interactive | 🟢 | Algorithms, Data structures | Steven Halim | 🔄 | ➖ | ✅ | 🌐 |
